name: Alternative.me Crypto
description: Crypto Fear & Greed Index and global market data. Free, no API key needed.

tools.name: fear_greed
tools.description: Get the current Crypto Fear & Greed Index (0-100). Factors: volatility, volume, social media, dominance, trends.

limit.description: Number of days of data (default 1, max ~3000 for full history)

tools.name: global
tools.description: Get global crypto market cap, BTC dominance, and active currencies count.
